entities.name: Idempotent Import
entities.context: Design principle ensuring duplicate Fitbit imports with the same external_id produce no duplicate rows

relationships.context: workout_tracker module uses SQLite as its persistence layer
workout_tracker accepts Fitbit as a workout source with external_id for deduplication
log_manual_workout implements idempotency by returning existing workout_id when external_id already exists
Fitbit data is ingested through log_manual_workout with source='fitbit' and external_id for dedup
